name: everyapi
title: EveryAPI
description: Use 240+ LLMs through the EveryAPI gateway from Raycast — chat, switch models, and monitor account activity.
author: everyapi_dev

commands.name: ask
commands.title: Ask EveryAPI
commands.subtitle: EveryAPI
commands.description: Ask any model in your EveryAPI account — Claude, GPT, Gemini, DeepSeek, etc.

commands.name: account
commands.title: Account & Usage
commands.subtitle: EveryAPI
commands.description: Sign in with OAuth, view your account and wallet, or sign out.

commands.name: switch-model
commands.title: Switch Default Model
commands.subtitle: EveryAPI
commands.description: Set the default model used by Ask EveryAPI.

commands.name: recent-logs
commands.title: Recent Requests
commands.subtitle: EveryAPI
commands.description: List your most recent LLM calls — model, tokens, cost, latency.

commands.name: channel-health
commands.title: Service Status
commands.subtitle: EveryAPI
commands.description: Live status of upstream AI providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, …) — aggregated from their public status pages by the EveryAPI gateway, with 24h history and active incidents.

preferences.name: baseUrl
preferences.title: Base URL
preferences.description: EveryAPI OAuth and API gateway URL. Leave default unless you use a self-hosted deployment.
